contract_invariants: every integration is governed by a declared trust contract; undeclared integrations are forbidden
no integration may write to canonical knowledge-core JSON
no integration may bypass supervision-receipt emission
no integration may suppress provenance or candidate-only markers for UX reasons
every integration is reversible; revocation is a first-class governance action

integration_contracts.escalation_obligation: render path MUST surface candidate-only / unresolved markers verbatim
integration_contracts.interaction_contract: read-only via theme/template; no runtime invocation from PHP
integration_contracts.provenance_guarantee: every rendered fragment cites manifest_id + source_files[].sha256
integration_contracts.supervision_contract: all rendered packages carry a supervision-receipt id
integration_contracts.trust_contract: render-only consumer of knowledge-core JSON; no write path back

integration_contracts.escalation_obligation: responses MUST refuse to omit candidate_only when present
integration_contracts.interaction_contract: request/response over declared schema; no streaming side effects
integration_contracts.provenance_guarantee: responses include provenance block before content block

integration_contracts.escalation_obligation: checksum mismatch halts ingestion and emits an escalation-trace event
integration_contracts.interaction_contract: one-way: OEM source → ingestion env → staging; never directly to production
integration_contracts.provenance_guarantee: every ingested artifact records source url, sha256, fetched_at, fetched_by
integration_contracts.trust_contract: semi-trusted; mirrors OEM sources via checksum-verified ingest

integration_contracts.escalation_obligation: consumers MUST forward unsafe-runtime events to escalation-console subscribers
integration_contracts.provenance_guarantee: events are immutable; consumers receive verbatim records
integration_contracts.supervision_contract: consumer identity is declared; no anonymous consumers

integration_contracts.escalation_obligation: consoles MUST surface escalation-trace events without delay
integration_contracts.interaction_contract: all actions go through declared decision sets per checkpoint
integration_contracts.supervision_contract: every console action carries operator id + supervision-receipt

integration_contracts.escalation_obligation: copilots MUST refuse to suggest at candidate-only + irreversible-adjacent context
integration_contracts.provenance_guarantee: copilots cite manifest_id + confidence tier alongside every suggestion
integration_contracts.supervision_contract: every copilot suggestion is logged + reversible

integration_contracts.escalation_obligation: modalities MUST honor halt and demote events from the runtime
integration_contracts.interaction_contract: modalities subscribe to existing NDJSON channels; do not introduce parallel channels
integration_contracts.provenance_guarantee: every modality renders provenance and confidence in its native form
integration_contracts.supervision_contract: every modality declares its operator profile mapping
integration_contracts.trust_contract: subordinate to runtime governance; new modalities are channels, not new architecture
